info.description: Partner API for Contio MeetingOS - External partner integration endpoints
info.title: Contio MeetingOS Partner API

get.description: Returns the JSON Web Key Set for token verification
Returns the OpenID Connect discovery document

post.description: Initiates passwordless authentication for partner OAuth flow with client-specific SECRET_HASH. Supports optional workspace_id to provision users into a shared workspace instead of creating a personal one, and is_admin to grant admin role in that workspace.

400.description: Invalid request format or workspace_id is not a valid UUID

403.description: Workspace does not belong to this partner (workspace_not_authorized)

409.description: User already belongs to a different workspace (workspace_conflict). Includes workspace_id field.

post.description: Verifies OTP code for partner OAuth flow with client-specific SECRET_HASH

get.description: Handles OAuth 2.0 authorization requests for partner applications

post.description: Completes OAuth 2.0 authorization after user consent and returns Cognito authorization code
Checks if user has already consented to the requested scopes and can skip consent page

get.description: Tests connectivity to Cognito and returns service status

post.description: Introspects access tokens to get token information
Revokes an access or refresh token. Per RFC 7009, returns success even for invalid tokens.

parameters.description: Hint about token type (access_token or refresh_token)
parameters.name: token_type_hint

get.description: Returns the list of all available OAuth scopes for partner applications

post.description: Exchanges authorization code for access tokens

get.description: Returns user information for the provided access token
Returns a paginated list of action buttons for the partner app

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Creates a new action button for the partner app

409.description: Conflict - a default action button already exists

get.description: Retrieves a single action button by ID for the partner app

put.description: Updates an existing action button for the partner app

409.description: Conflict - a default action button already exists

delete.description: Soft-deletes an action button for the partner app

get.description: Retrieves information about the authenticated partner app

put.description: Updates partner app details like name, description, and webhook URL
Updates the status of the authenticated partner app

get.description: Retrieves user connections for the authenticated partner app with pagination and filtering
Retrieves a specific user connection by ID if it belongs to the authenticated partner app

delete.description: Revokes a user connection by ID if it belongs to the authenticated partner app

get.description: Returns the status, age, and health information for all partner credentials

post.description: Restores the API key to the prior value after rotation
Rotates the API key with optional grace period
Restores the client secret to the prior value after rotation
Rotates the client secret with optional grace period

get.description: Returns the audit history for credential operations

post.description: Rotates the webhook secret with optional grace period

get.description: Retrieves the OIDC IdP configuration for the authenticated partner app

put.description: Updates the OIDC IdP configuration for the authenticated partner app. Note: idp_client_id and idp_client_secret are the OIDC credentials from your Identity Provider (e.g., Okta, Azure AD), NOT your Contio Partner OAuth credentials.

400.description: Invalid request body or validation error

post.description: Creates a new OIDC IdP configuration for the authenticated partner app. Note: idp_client_id and idp_client_secret are the OIDC credentials from your Identity Provider (e.g., Okta, Azure AD), NOT your Contio Partner OAuth credentials.

400.description: Invalid request body or validation error

delete.description: Deletes the OIDC IdP configuration for the authenticated partner app

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of next steps for the authenticated partner app

post.description: Creates a new next step for the authenticated partner app

get.description: Retrieves a specific next step by ID for the authenticated partner app

put.description: Updates an existing next step for the authenticated partner app

delete.description: Deletes a next step for the authenticated partner app

get.description: Retrieves all action buttons associated with a next step for the partner app
get.summary: Get action buttons for a next step

post.description: Adds an action button to a next step for the partner app
post.summary: Add action button to next step

404.description: Next step or action button not found

delete.description: Removes an action button from a next step. The action button must belong to the partner.
delete.summary: Remove action button from next step

204.description: Action button removed from next step

404.description: Next step or action button not found

put.description: Sets an action button as the default for a next step. The action button must already be associated with the next step.
put.summary: Set default action button for next step

404.description: Next step or action button not found

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of templates for the authenticated partner app

post.description: Creates a new template for the authenticated partner app. Optionally, provide a backing_meeting_id to clone content from an existing meeting.

400.description: Invalid request body or backing meeting validation error

403.description: Partner does not have access to the backing meeting's workspace

get.description: Retrieves a template for the authenticated partner app

put.description: Updates a template for the authenticated partner app

delete.description: Deletes a template for the authenticated partner app

get.description: Returns the next steps for a template for the authenticated partner app

post.description: Adds a next step to a template for the authenticated partner app

204.description: Next step added to template successfully

404.description: Template or next step not found

put.description: Updates the autopilot flag for a next step in a template

204.description: Template next step association updated successfully

404.description: Template or next step not found

delete.description: Removes a next step from a template for the authenticated partner app

204.description: Next step removed from template successfully

404.description: Template or next step not found

get.description: Retrieves all toolkits for the authenticated partner app

post.description: Creates a new toolkit for the authenticated partner app

get.description: Retrieves a toolkit by ID for the authenticated partner app

put.description: Updates an existing toolkit for the authenticated partner app

delete.description: Deletes a toolkit for the authenticated partner app

get.description: Retrieves webhook deliveries for the authenticated partner app

parameters.description: Filter by delivery status (pending, delivered, failed, abandoned)
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Filter by event type (e.g., meeting.created, workflow.assignment.created)
parameters.name: event_type

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 50, max 100)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Retrieves a specific webhook delivery by ID

post.description: Retries a failed webhook delivery

put.description: Configures include or exclude event filtering for webhook delivery

400.description: Invalid request body or event types

delete.description: Removes webhook event filtering for the authenticated partner app

put.description: Enables or disables webhook delivery for the authenticated partner app

400.description: Invalid request body or pending disposition

get.description: Retrieves all workflows for the authenticated partner app

post.description: Creates a new workflow for action item matching

400.description: Invalid request body or validation error

get.description: Retrieves a specific workflow by ID for the authenticated partner app

put.description: Updates a specific workflow for the authenticated partner app

400.description: Invalid request body or validation error

get.description: Returns safe public partner app information for display in OAuth login/consent pages. This endpoint does not require client authentication and only returns safe public information like name and company.
get.summary: Get Public Partner Information by Client ID

get.description: Handles the OIDC callback from the partner's identity provider. Exchanges the authorization code for tokens, validates the ID token, and provisions or authenticates the user.

302.description: Redirect to application after successful authentication

get.description: Returns partner branding and SSO configuration status for landing pages. This endpoint is publicly accessible and rate-limited.
Starts the SSO authentication flow for a partner's identity provider. Looks up the partner by slug, retrieves IdP configuration, generates PKCE parameters, and returns an authorization URL.

parameters.description: Target platform: web (default), desktop, backlog, or meeting:{id}
parameters.name: target

404.description: Partner not found or IdP not configured

get.description: Returns the current status of a partner SSO session for polling. Used by clients to check if authentication has completed.
Retrieves action items accessible to the authenticated partner user

post.description: Creates a new action item on behalf of the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieves a specific action item by ID if accessible to the authenticated partner user

put.description: Updates an existing action item if accessible to the authenticated user

delete.description: Deletes an action item if accessible to the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of calendar events for the authenticated user within a specified time range

parameters.description: Number of results per page (default 25, max 100)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Sort direction: asc or desc (default: asc)
parameters.name: direction

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific calendar event for the authenticated user

403.description: User does not have access to this calendar event

post.description: Creates a new meeting by copying details from a calendar event

200.description: Meeting already exists for this calendar event

get.description: Retrieves meeting templates accessible to the authenticated partner user based on ownership hierarchy

parameters.description: Maximum number of items per page
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Retrieves a meeting template by ID with its full contents

post.description: Applies a meeting template's content to an existing meeting. This is an additive operation.

get.description: Retrieves the AI workflow configurations associated with a meeting template
Retrieves meetings accessible to the authenticated partner user

post.description: Creates a new meeting on behalf of the authenticated partner user

get.description: Retrieves a specific meeting by ID if accessible to the authenticated partner user. When the autopilot_smart_redirect feature flag is enabled and the meeting has been copied to the user's workspace, the response will contain only the redirect_to_meeting_id field pointing to the workspace copy. Clients should follow this redirect to access the correct meeting. The Partner SDK handles this automatically.

200.description: Meeting details or smart redirect hint (redirect_to_meeting_id field only when redirecting)

patch.description: Updates an existing meeting if accessible to the authenticated partner user

get.description:
Retrieves action buttons available for a meeting through its applied templates and next steps.
Action buttons are de-duplicated across all next steps associated with the meeting.
get.summary: Get action buttons for a meeting

post.description: Fires an action button manually. This triggers a webhook to the partner's registered endpoint.

parameters.description: Optional next step and result context
parameters.name: request

404.description: Meeting or action button not found

get.description: Retrieves all agenda items for a specific meeting. Filters out items restricted to leads if the user is not an editor.
get.summary: Get agenda items for a meeting

post.description: Creates a new agenda item for a meeting. User must be a participant of the meeting.

403.description: User is not a participant of the meeting

put.description: Updates an existing agenda item. User must be a participant of the meeting.

403.description: User is not a participant of the meeting

delete.description: Deletes an agenda item. User must be a participant of the meeting.

403.description: User is not a participant of the meeting

post.description: Link an existing calendar event to a specific meeting

200.description: Meeting linked to calendar event successfully

400.description: Invalid meeting ID format or request body

404.description: Meeting or calendar event not found

409.description: Calendar event already linked to another meeting

delete.description: Remove the link between a calendar event and a specific meeting

200.description: Meeting unlinked from calendar event successfully

get.description: Lists partner-scoped meeting contexts for a meeting with pagination.

post.description: Uploads a partner-scoped meeting context for a meeting using multipart/form-data.

get.description: Retrieves a specific partner-scoped meeting context by context ID.

delete.description: Deletes a specific partner-scoped meeting context by context ID.

get.description: Streams the file bytes for a specific partner-scoped meeting context.

200.description: Context file stream; Content-Disposition includes filename

get.description: Retrieves next steps available for a meeting through its applied templates
get.summary: Get next steps for a meeting

post.description: Executes a next step for a meeting. For AI-type next steps, this triggers AI generation. For redirect-type next steps, this returns the redirect URL.

404.description: Meeting or next step not found

get.description: Retrieves all participants for a specific meeting accessible to the authenticated partner user

post.description: Adds a participant to a specific meeting. User must be an editor of the meeting.

403.description: User is not an editor of the meeting

delete.description: Removes a participant from a specific meeting. User must be an editor of the meeting.

403.description: User is not an editor of the meeting

get.description: Retrieves AI-generated content from a next step execution. Results expire after 7 days.
Retrieves the authenticated user's profile information including workspace details and role
Retrieves a paginated list of chat sessions for the authenticated user

parameters.description: Number of sessions to skip (0-based, default: 0)
parameters.name: offset

post.description: Creates a new chat session for the authenticated user. Optionally accepts an initial message.

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific chat session including turns based on query parameters

put.description: Submits a new message to an existing chat session
put.summary: Send a message to a session

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific turn within a chat session by its ID

400.description: Invalid session ID or turn ID

get.description: Retrieves toolkits available for installation in the user's workspace

parameters.description: Maximum number of items per page
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Installs a toolkit to the authenticated user's workspace, creating all defined entities

get.description: Retrieves toolkits currently installed in a workspace with installation details

delete.description: Removes a toolkit installation from the authenticated user's workspace

404.description: Toolkit not found or not installed

content_format.description: Content format: rich_text, markdown, plain_text, html

created_at.description: When the action button was created

delivery_mechanism.description: Delivery mechanism: webhook, redirect, email, clipboard, file_download, integration, os_email_client

file_format.description: File format for file_download delivery mechanism

icon_url.description: Icon URL for the action button

id.description: Unique identifier for the action button

integration_type.description: Integration type for integration delivery mechanism

is_active.description: Whether the action button is active

is_default_for_next_step.description: Whether this is the default action button for next steps

redirect_url.description: Redirect URL for redirect delivery mechanism

requires_connected_integration.description: Whether the action button requires a connected integration

updated_at.description: When the action button was last updated

webhook_url.description: Webhook URL for webhook delivery mechanism

code.description: Unique identifier for the error type

error.description: User-friendly description of what went wrong

description.example: Call or schedule meeting to discuss

partner_context.description: Partner-specific context data stored with the action item

status.description: Current status (needs_review, accepted, in_progress, blocked, completed, cancelled)

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the action item was last updated

calendar.GetCalendarEventsError400.description: Bad request error for listing calendar events

code.description: Error code identifying the specific type of error

calendar.LinkCalendarEventError400.description: Bad request error for linking a calendar event to a meeting

code.description: Unique identifier for the error type

error.description: User-friendly description of what went wrong

request_id.description: Request identifier to correlate errors with logs

message.example: Meeting linked to calendar event successfully

attendees.description: List of attendees for the calendar event

description.description: Description or body of the calendar event

end_time.description: End time of the event in RFC3339 format

id.description: Unique identifier for the calendar event

linked_meetings.description: IDs of all linked Contio meetings, sorted by creation date (oldest first)

location.description: Location of the event (physical or virtual)

meeting_id.description: Deprecated: Use linked_meetings instead. ID of the first (oldest) linked Contio meeting.

start_time.description: Start time of the event in RFC3339 format

created.description: Whether a new meeting was created (false if existing meeting was returned)

message.example: Meeting created successfully from calendar event

created_at.description: Timestamp when the connection was created

feature_activated_at.description: When the partner feature was activated for this user

id.description: Unique identifier for the user connection

last_used_at.description: When the user last used the partner integration

oauth_expires_at.description: Expiration time of the OAuth token

oauth_scopes.description: OAuth scopes granted by the user

status.description: Current status of the connection (active, inactive, revoked)

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the connection was last updated

user_email.description: Email address of the connected user

user_name.description: Display name of the connected user

credential_type.description: Type of credential that was rotated (api_key or client_secret)

grace_period_ends_at.description: When the grace period ends and old credential stops working

new_credential.description: The newly generated credential value (only shown once)

rollback_token.description: Token to use if you need to rollback to the previous credential

age_days.description: Age of the credential in days

grace_period_ends_at.description: When the grace period ends (if in pending_rotation status)

last_rotated_at.description: When the credential was last rotated

last_used_at.description: When the credential was last used for authentication

errors.ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response format used across all API endpoints. All error responses follow this consistent structure for predictable error handling.

code.description: Unique identifier for the error type, useful for programmatic error handling

message.description: User-friendly description of what went wrong
message.example: The requested resource could not be found

request_id.description: Request identifier to correlate errors with logs

errors.PartnerConflictErrorResponse.description: Error response for workspace conflict (409). Includes the user's current workspace_id.

code.description: Unique identifier for the error type, useful for programmatic error handling

error.description: User-friendly description of what went wrong
error.example: User already belongs to a different workspace

message.description: Deprecated: Use 'error' field instead. Will be removed in v2.0
message.example: User already belongs to a different workspace

request_id.description: Request identifier to correlate errors with logs

workspace_id.description: The workspace ID the user currently belongs to

errors.PartnerErrorResponse.description: Standard error response format used across all partner API endpoints. This format is used by both partner admin and partner user APIs for consistency. DEPRECATION NOTICE (v2.0): The 'message' field will be removed in the next major release. Partners should migrate to using the 'error' field instead.

code.description: Unique identifier for the error type, useful for programmatic error handling

error.description: User-friendly description of what went wrong

message.description: Deprecated: Use 'error' field instead. Will be removed in v2.0

request_id.description: Request identifier to correlate errors with logs

idp.CreateIdPConfigError400.description: Bad request error for creating IdP configuration

code.description: Unique identifier for the error type

error.description: User-friendly description of what went wrong

request_id.description: Request identifier to correlate errors with logs

allowed_email_domains.description: Email domains allowed for SSO (required for strict mode). Users with other domains will be rejected.

claim_mappings.description: Maps Contio user fields to IdP claim names. Defaults to {"email": "email", "name": "name"}. Only change if your IdP uses non-standard claim names.

discovery_url.description: OIDC discovery endpoint URL from your Identity Provider (must end with /.well-known/openid-configuration)

idp_client_id.description: OAuth Client ID from your Identity Provider's OIDC application. This is NOT your Contio Partner client_id.

idp_client_secret.description: OAuth Client Secret from your Identity Provider's OIDC application. This is NOT your Contio Partner client_secret. Stored encrypted at rest.

mode.description: Domain validation mode: "strict" requires allowed_email_domains, "partner_managed" trusts your IdP's user base

name.description: Display name for this IdP configuration

scopes.description: OIDC scopes to request during authentication. Defaults to ["openid", "email", "profile"]

claim_mappings.description: Maps Contio user fields to IdP claim names

discovery_last_fetched_at.description: When the OIDC discovery document was last fetched

idp_client_id.description: OAuth Client ID from your Identity Provider (secret is never returned)

is_active.description: Whether this IdP configuration is active

name.description: Display name for this IdP configuration

idp.UpdateIdPConfigError400.description: Bad request error for updating IdP configuration

code.description: Unique identifier for the error type

error.description: User-friendly description of what went wrong

request_id.description: Request identifier to correlate errors with logs

allowed_email_domains.description: Email domains allowed for SSO (required for strict mode)

claim_mappings.description: Maps Contio user fields to IdP claim names

discovery_url.description: OIDC discovery endpoint URL from your Identity Provider

idp_client_id.description: OAuth Client ID from your Identity Provider's OIDC application. This is NOT your Contio Partner client_id.

idp_client_secret.description: OAuth Client Secret from your Identity Provider's OIDC application. This is NOT your Contio Partner client_secret. Stored encrypted at rest.

is_active.description: Enable or disable this IdP configuration

name.description: Display name for this IdP configuration

scopes.description: OIDC scopes to request during authentication

The meeting's agenda items, participants, and talking points will be copied to the new template.
The partner must have access to the workspace containing the meeting.

sort_order.description: Sort order of the next step

next_steps.description: NextSteps defines the next steps to attach to this template with junction fields

BackingMeetingID references an existing meeting to use as the content source for this template.
When specified, the meeting's agenda items, participants, documents, and talking points
are copied to the new template's backing meeting during toolkit installation.

sort_order.description: SortOrder is the display order of the action button within the next step

autopilot.description: Autopilot indicates if the next step should auto-execute when the meeting is finalized

next_step.description: NextStep is the reference to the next step entity ($ref or $id)

sort_order.description: SortOrder is the display order of the next step within the template

Action buttons included in the toolkit

Next steps included in the toolkit

Templates included in the toolkit

tags.name: OAuth 2.0
tags.description:
Obtain and refresh access tokens for user-scoped API calls using the OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow. Partners redirect users to the Contio authorization endpoint, receive an authorization code, and exchange it for a short-lived access token and a long-lived refresh token.

**Required credentials:** `client_id` + `client_secret` (issued during partner onboarding).

tags.name: Single Sign-On
tags.description:
Configure OIDC-based Single Sign-On so your users can authenticate with Contio using your corporate identity provider (e.g. Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace). Once an IdP configuration is active, Contio redirects SSO logins through your provider and maps the returned claims to Contio user accounts.

**Required scope:** Admin API key (`X-API-Key` header).

tags.name: App Management
tags.description: Create, update, and inspect your partner application registration. The partner app record stores your webhook URL, OAuth redirect URIs, event filter settings, and branding configuration.

tags.name: Connection Management
tags.description: List and manage the OAuth connections that link individual Contio users to your partner application. A connection is created the first time a user completes the OAuth authorization flow and is revoked when the user disconnects.

tags.name: Credential Management
tags.description: Rotate and manage the API keys associated with your partner application. Use these endpoints to issue new keys and revoke compromised ones without interrupting active OAuth connections.

tags.name: IdP Management
tags.description: Register and configure an OIDC identity provider for Single Sign-On. Contio performs OIDC discovery automatically once you supply the issuer URL, client credentials, and the email domains that should be routed through this IdP.

tags.name: Template Management
tags.description:
Create, update, and manage meeting templates. Templates are pre-configured meeting structures that can be applied to meetings to add content. Templates can include agenda items, participants, next steps, and action buttons. Use these endpoints to create, update, and manage templates and their associated next steps and action buttons.

**Required scope:** Admin API key (`X-API-Key` header).

tags.name: Toolkit Management
tags.description:
Create, update, and manage toolkits for your partner application. Toolkits are bundles of pre-configured entities (templates, action buttons, next steps) that can be installed into user workspaces as a cohesive feature set.

**Required scope:** Admin API key (`X-API-Key` header).

tags.name: Webhook Management
tags.description:
Configure the webhook endpoint that Contio uses to deliver real-time event notifications. You can also filter which event types are delivered and inspect recent delivery attempts.

See the [Webhook Events reference](/partner-api/api-reference/webhooks/) for the full list of supported event types and payload schemas.

tags.name: Workflow Management
tags.description: Define and manage meeting workflow automations. Workflows let you trigger custom logic — such as CRM updates or task creation — based on meeting lifecycle events like transcription completion or action-item extraction.

tags.name: Action Items
tags.description: Retrieve, create, and update action items that have been extracted from meetings. Action items include the task description, owner, due date, and current status.

tags.name: Agenda Items
tags.description: Read and write agenda items associated with a meeting. Agenda items can be set before a meeting starts and are available to all participants.

tags.name: Calendar
tags.description: Access calendar events linked to Contio meetings. These endpoints let you list upcoming events, retrieve event details, and associate calendar events with Contio meeting records.

tags.name: Chat Sessions
tags.description:
Create and manage asynchronous, turn-based chat sessions with the Contio AI agent on behalf of your users. Sessions are scoped to a specific meeting; the agent uses the meeting transcript and any supplied context documents to answer queries.

**Required scopes:** `chat:read` (GET) · `chat:write` (POST / PUT).

tags.name: Context
tags.description: Upload and manage context documents that are made available to the Contio AI agent during chat sessions. Documents can be plain text, markdown, or structured data and are scoped to a specific meeting.

tags.name: Meetings
tags.description: Retrieve meeting details, transcripts, and summaries. These endpoints also let you programmatically create meetings from calendar events and update meeting metadata.

tags.name: Participants
tags.description: List and manage the participants associated with a meeting, including their roles, contact information, and speaking-time statistics.

tags.name: Templates
tags.description: Retrieve meeting templates and their associated next steps and action buttons. You can also apply one or more templates to a meeting, which adds the template's content to the meeting.

tags.name: User Profile
tags.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's Contio profile, including display name, email address, and feature-activation status for the partner integration.

tags.name: Toolkits
tags.description:
Browse and install toolkits in user workspaces. Toolkits provide pre-configured feature sets that partners have published for their users. Installing a toolkit creates all associated entities (templates, action buttons, next steps) in the target workspace.

**Required scopes:** `toolkits:read` (GET) · `toolkits:write` (POST / DELETE).
